'''Yitheeth''' was an [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Yinchorri system]]. The [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] built at least one city on its surface. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]], it was the site of the [[Ambush on Yitheeth]]. Shallow seas [[Waterworld/Legends|covered]] 93% of its surface.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' names Yitheeth as a moon of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], when [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'']] makes it clear it is a planet.
